text.title: API-First Development Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying API-First Development. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: generate-mocks-and-stubs
step.action: Run Prism mock + openapi-generator for server stubs.

step.name: ship-and-version
step.action: Tag API version; publish to client SDK pipeline.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
